title: Latiao Craft 2
description: This mod brings Latiao into Minecraft.
body:
# Latiao Craft 2 ![Latiao Craft 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/608e00f743bbccd17e0b7e46235a1c2a9f2d6f02.png)

Latiao, also known as Spicy Stick, is a unique snack originating from China. It is a type of food made primarily from wheat flour, other grains, or legumes.
辣条是中国的一种特色零食，是以小麦粉或其他谷物、豆类为主要原料做成的一种食物。

This mod brings many of Latiao into Minecraft, allowing players to indulge in the deliciousness of Latiao within the game.
本模组为 Minecraft 添加了大量的辣条，玩家们可以尽情在游戏里享受辣条带来的美味。

You can cook various types of Latiao in the Latiao Oven, flavor them at the Flavoring Table, or go on adventures to discover treasure Latiao.
你可以在辣条烤炉里制作各式各样的辣条，在调味台上给辣条进行调味，亦或者是去探险来获取宝藏辣条。

By consuming different kinds of Latiao, you can gain various status effects or experience some unexpected surprises.
通过食用各种辣条，你可以获得不同的状态效果，或者是发生一些你意想不到的的惊喜。

By the way, you can also become a diligent farmer, growing various types of peppers in the game to provide spices for cooking Latiao.
当然你也可以化身为一位辛勤的耕种者，在游戏种植各种各样的辣椒，为制作辣条提供调料。

_"Latiao Craft 2" is a remade version of "[Latiao Craft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/latiao-craft)"._
_「辣条工艺 2」是「[辣条工艺](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/552.html)」的重制版_

![Some Latiao Exhibition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e856fdcf32b5efa085ff5207a714cf5800888412.png) ## Compatible Mods 联动模组 | English Name | 中文名称 | Link 传送门 | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | Just Enough Items | JEI物品管理器 | https://modrinth.com/mod/jei | | Patchouli | 帕秋莉手册 | https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli | | Just Enough Effect Descriptions (JEED) | JEI药水效果 | https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-effect-descriptions-jeed | | The Twilight Forest | 暮色森林 | https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest | | Farmer's Delight | 农夫乐事 | https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight | | Create | 机械动力 | https://modrinth.com/mod/create | | Applied Energistics 2 | 应用能源2 | https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2 | | Serene Seasons | 静谧四季 | https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons | | Crock Pot | 烹饪锅 | https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crock-pot | | Tofu Craft Reload | 豆腐工艺重制版 | https://modrinth.com/mod/tofucraftreload | | Immortalers Delight | 千古乐事 | https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immortalers-delight | ![Latiao Cookbook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4126a699827055418217f4245e427f06302850fd.png) ## Contributors 贡献者 Development Team: Doggy Studio
开发团队：嗷呜机工作室

Coder : Chiren Chen
程序：赤刃

Artist : TH_my, CWQS
美工：裂纹虎克、汽水

Tester : SJKD, GingerMeow
测试：SJKD、姜喵

Special Thanks : Mikhail Tapio, BusyOrc, Bei_Dou
特别感谢：北斗余晖、稀神旭东、北斗·神 ## Official Links 官方链接 CurseForge : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/latiao-craft-2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/latiao-craft-2)
MCMOD (Chinese WIKI) MC百科 : [https://www.mcmod.cn/class/17541.html](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/17541.html)

If you find any bugs, have creative ideas, or can provide translation files in other languages, feel free to send them to my email: chirenchen2004@gmail.com
如果您发现任何程序错误、有创意性的想法，或是能提供其他语言的翻译文件，欢迎随时发送至我的邮箱： chirenchen2004@gmail.com

If you have QQ account, welcome join in our QQ group: 1145829596
如果您拥有QQ账号，欢迎加入我们的群聊：1145829596
